posts.author: jasonava (Jason Ava)
posts.cookedHtml:
Aloha! Is there a way to import the emails I receive into my monday board?

For example, I receive emails from customers, but I have to open ‘Updates’ to view their email address. I would like to collect that email and populate the email field on the board. This makes it easier to respond via recipe.

Right now, I have to open ‘Updates’ and copy the email address and paste it on the board. Is there a better way to do this? Your help is much appreciated. Mahalo!
